title: Handcuffs mod
description: So this projects adds handcuffs. You click a player and then a fence to attach them for 5 minutes. Sadly no texture rn, anybody who can help me tell me you mail send me a mail on gamingartis1@hotmail.com
body:
Craft a pair of Handcuffs as a new item
Right-click another player while holding them
That player gets chained to the nearest fence post and cannot move
They stay locked in place for 5 minutes
After the timer runs out they are automatically freed
